title: lego #3004
definition:
1) to say, to speak
    1a) affirm over, maintain
    1b) to teach
    1c) to exhort, advise, to command, direct
    1d) to point out with words, intend, mean, mean to say
    1e) to call by name, to call, name
    1f) to speak out, speak of, mention
